message:
Running command: # The nc_lib_root for IP cores is /nc/ip (where NC_AMBA, NC_UART etc are)
# The project's ip/ folder symlinks to /nc/ip/X/version directories
# Let's verify the symlink targets
ls /nc/ip/NC_AMBA/v1.1.0/ | head -10
echo ""
# Check if project_root/ip works as nc_lib_root
ls "$PROJECT_ROOT/ip/NC_AMBA/" | head -10
